---
title: "Legal Analysis: Naples California"
description: "This is a legal analysis representing the Gaviota Coastal Council, the Environmental Defense Center, and the Surfrider Foundation, opposing the plan of residential private development on agricultural land in Naples, Santa Barbara County."
date: 5/27/26
categories: [Writing]
image: sb-naples-thumbnail.jpg
draft: false
---
<p class="center-text">You can also read the paper here: [Legal Analysis - Naples California {{< fa file-pdf title= "pdf" >}}](ENVS 125C Naples Paper - Google Docs.pdf)</p>

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; width: 100%;">
<object data="ENVS 125C Naples Paper - Google Docs.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="80%" height="1000px"></object>
